response.original_title: Forced Choice // Heaven Has No Beauty Like A Woman Scored
response.overview: Forced Choice is a silent performance art film structured as a sequence of questions that invite the audience to determine the emotional logic of the live score. Part ritual, part social experiment, the work reveals the subtle coercion embedded in participatory frameworks: the emotional expectations placed on women, the illusion of agency, and the way audiences believe they are co-creating when they are, in fact, being directed.
response.title: Forced Choice // Heaven Has No Beauty Like A Woman Scored
